---
title: "Welcome to my Personal Website!"
---

This website belongs to Song Chendi, a 23 years old Chinese young person.

All rights reserved, and infringement will be peosecuted.


### Basic Information
Name: Song Chendi

Major: Agricultural Informatization

School: Huazhong Agricultural University

E-mail: songchendi@webmail.hzau.edu.cn

### Interests
Professional: Remote Sensing in Agriculture

Sports: Hiding, Citywalking, Table Tennis

Arts: Singing, Photographing, Writing

Relaxation: Reading
